zh.lifeSummary: 當Adelaide de Normandie於大約1003年出生在法國諾門迪瑟-馬利盧時，她的父親Richard II 'le Bon' duc de Normandie41歲，母親Judith de Bretagne duchesse consort de Normandie22歲。她於1016年9月13日與Renaud Ier de Bourgogne結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。她去世於1038年7月7日在法國德 艾斯特芒內享年36歲，埋葬在法國布格奧。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Adelaide de Normandie于大约1003年出生在法国諾門迪瑟-馬利盧时，她的父亲Richard II 'le Bon' duc de Normandie41岁，母亲Judith de Bretagne duchesse consort de Normandie22岁。她于1016年9月13日与Renaud Ier de Bourgogne结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。她去世于1038年7月7日在法国德 艾斯特芒內享年36岁，埋葬在法国布格奧。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Normandie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Alain, Serge, Adrien, Andre, Aurore, Celine, Clovis, Emile, Gaetan, Gilles, Laurier.
French: from a diminutive of   Normand  . Compare   Normandy  .

variants.name: Normand
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Gaston, Andre, Laurent, Marcel, Pierre, Amie, Donat, Emile, Herve, Jacques, Jean Noel, Jean-Michel.
French and Breton (mainly Finistère; also Le Normand): habitational name for someone from Normandy, a region in northern France (see Norman ). Compare Lenormand .

variants.name: Normandy
meanings: English: habitational name from Normandy in northern France. This surname is now rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Adelaide
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Germanic origin (via French Adélaïde ), from adal ‘noble’ + heid ‘kind, sort’. It was borne in the 10th century by the wife of the Holy Roman Emperor Otto the Great. She became regent after his death and was revered as a saint. The given name increased in popularity in England during the 19th century, when it was borne by the wife of King William IV; she was the daughter of the ruler of the German duchy of Saxe-Meiningen. The Australian city of Adelaide was named in her honour.

en.lifeSummary: When Adelaide de Normandie was born about 1003, in Rouen, Seine-Maritime, Normandy, France, her father, Richard II 'le Bon' duc de Normandie, was 41 and her mother, Judith de Bretagne duchesse consort de Normandie, was 22. She married Renaud Ier de Bourgogne on 13 September 1016. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. She died on 7 July 1038, in Marne, Grand Est, France, at the age of 36, and was buried in Auxerre, Yonne, Burgundy, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Adelaide de Normandie est née environ 1003, à Rouen, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, France, son père, Richard II 'le Bon' duc de Normandie, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Judith de Bretagne duchesse consort de Normandie, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Renaud Ier de Bourgogne le 13 septembre 1016. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Elle est décédée le 7 juillet 1038, à Marne, Grand Est, France, à l’âge de 36 ans, et a été enterrée à Auxerre, Yonne, Bourgogne, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Adelaide de Normandie um 1003 in Rouen, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Richard II 'le Bon' duc de Normandie 41 und ihre Mutter Judith de Bretagne duchesse consort de Normandie 22. Sie hat am 13. September 1016 Renaud Ier de Bourgogne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Sie starb am 7. Juli 1038 im Alter von 36 Jahren in Marne, Großer Osten, Frankreich und wurde in Auxerre, Yonne, Burgund, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Adelaide de Normandie è nata il circa 1003 nel Rouen, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Francia, sua padre, Richard II 'le Bon' duc de Normandie, aveva 41 anni e sua madre, Judith de Bretagne duchesse consort de Normandie, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato Renaud Ier de Bourgogne il 13 settembre 1016. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Morì il 7 luglio 1038, nel Marne, Grand Est, Francia, all'età di 36 anni, e fu sepolta a Auxerre, Yonne, Bourgogne, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Adelaide de Normandieが約1003年にフランスノーマンディセアイネ-マリティメロウンで生まれた時，父Richard II 'le Bon' duc de Normandieは41歳，母Judith de Bretagne duchesse consort de Normandieは22歳であった。1016年9月13日にRenaud Ier de Bourgogneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼女は1038年7月7日にフランスグランド エストマルンで36歳で死去し，フランスボウルゴグンイオンアウクセアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Adelaide de Normandie(이)가 대략 1003년 프랑스 노먼디 세이인-마이팀 루언에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard II 'le Bon' duc de Normandie(은)는 41세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Judith de Bretagne duchesse consort de Normandie(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1016년 9월 13일 Renaud Ier de Bourgogne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1038년 7월 7일 프랑스 그랜드 에스트 마니에서 36세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 부르고그니 욘 오세르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Adelaide de Normandie nasceu aproximadamente 1003, em Rouen, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, França, seu pai, Richard II 'le Bon' duc de Normandie, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Judith de Bretagne duchesse consort de Normandie, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com Renaud Ier de Bourgogne em 13 de setembro de 1016. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ela faleceu em 7 de julho de 1038, em Marne, Grand Est, França, com 36 anos, e foi sepultada em Auxerre, Yonne, Bourgogne, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Adelaide de Normandie родилась около 1003 г. в местности роуен, сине-маритим, норманди, Франция, её отцу по имени Richard II 'le Bon' duc de Normandie было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Judith de Bretagne duchesse consort de Normandie, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Renaud Ier de Bourgogne 13 сентября 1016 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Она умерла 7 июля 1038 г. в местности марн, гранд эст, Франция в возрасте 36 лет и была похоронена в местности ауксирр, енн, бургогн, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Adelaide de Normandie nació aproximadamente 1003, en Rouen, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Francia, su papá, Richard II 'le Bon' duc de Normandie, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Judith de Bretagne duchesse consort de Normandie, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Renaud Ier de Bourgogne el 13 de septiembre de 1016. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos. Murió el 7 de julio de 1038, en Marne, Grand Est, Francia, a la edad de 36 años, y fue sepultada en Auxerre, Yonne, Bourgogne, Francia.
